alt_text: Teaching diagram: a balance/scale labelled 'al-'Aql / Intelligence' at top; on the left pan are two dark grey 'al-'Ilm / Knowledge' circles labelled '2 EVILS'; on the right pan are two pink 'al-'Ilm / Knowledge' circles labelled '2 GOODS'.
notes: Pedagogical metaphor: intellect is a scale that weighs knowledge of evils against knowledge of goods, enabling moral discrimination.
